title: EXP Viewer!
description: Simple XP HUD with exact values and clear notifications.
body:
# EXP Viewer!

**EXP Viewer!** is a client-side HUD mod for Fabric (Minecraft **1.20.x**) that makes experience tracking clearer and more dynamic.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00c3012448e6d4531aaa8918344a8786a2e4b220_0.webp)

It shows exact XP points in `current / required` format, displays gain/spend notifications, and adds clean level-up visual effects.

## Features

*   XP points display near the vanilla XP bar
*   Separate level display
*   Notifications for:
    *   XP gain
    *   XP spent on enchanting
    *   XP spent on repairs (anvil / Mending)
*   Optional notification icons
*   Level-up effects and particles
*   Optional custom bitmap font
*   Flexible animation system with detailed controls

## Dependencies

### Required

*   **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**

### Optional

*   **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** (recommended for easy config access from the mods list)

### Dependency Notes

*   The mod is client-side only.
*   Servers do not need this mod installed.
*   Without Mod Menu, you can still use the in-game config command.

## Presets

* ### Standart

![Standart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7431bdf021e5e92e5a3d26527a8cf6b162af5fa3_0.webp)

* ### Compact 

![Compact](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70f5d84b896ba78b6c12fbc5135893d7399c676a_0.webp)

## Configuration

You can configure:

*   full mod enable/disable
*   XP notifications on/off
*   notification icons on/off
*   max visible notification lines
*   all animations globally or by specific groups
*   custom font on/off

## Compatibility

*   Minecraft: **1.20 – 1.20.6**
*   Loader: **Fabric**
*   Client-side only (no server installation required)

Detailed Feature Breakdown

*   XP value shown as `current / required` near the XP bar
*   Gain/spend notifications with optional icons
*   Separate animation toggles for:
    *   XP HUD fade
    *   notification motion
    *   level-up effects
*   Optional custom bitmap font rendering

## Who Is It For

EXP Viewer! is for players who want to:

*   track XP progress more precisely
*   see where XP is spent
*   get a cleaner, more informative XP HUD without UI clutter
